title: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Assistant Drugs Inspector and Data Entry Operator Posts
description: The latest Centre for Management Development (CMD) Kerala has declared the official notification for the recruitment of 40 Assistant Drugs Inspector and Data Entry Operator Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Pharm or any degree can use this chance and apply for the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligble candidates can apply online b...
